files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Trigger successful pipeline run via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a valid POST request to /api/pipeline/run returns a 202 status and a run_id.
preconditions: Diff analysis and RAG components are initialized

steps.assertion: Response status is 202 and contains a UUID run_id

scenarios.expected_result: A 202 Accepted response is received with a valid run_id and the pipeline starts in the background.

scenarios.title: List completed pipeline reports
scenarios.description: Ensure the reports dashboard lists existing pipeline runs sorted by most recent.
preconditions: At least one pipeline run has completed and saved to the reports directory

steps.assertion: Response is a list of run summaries

scenarios.expected_result: The API returns a JSON list of report summaries, including run_id and labels.

scenarios.title: Retrieve specific report details
scenarios.description: Fetch the full JSON detail for a specific run_id.
preconditions: A valid report exists for run_id 'test-uuid-123'

steps.assertion: Response status is 200 and contains diff_result

scenarios.expected_result: Full pipeline run details including stage results (STARTED, DIFF_ANALYZED, etc.) are returned.

scenarios.title: Submit pipeline run with empty payload
scenarios.description: Verify the API handles missing required fields in the PipelineRunRequest.
scenarios.expected_result: FastAPI validation error is returned for missing run_label and diff_text.

scenarios.title: Request non-existent report ID
scenarios.description: Verify 404 behavior when requesting a report that does not exist on disk.
scenarios.expected_result: The server returns a 404 error indicating the report file was not found.

scenarios.title: Handle extremely large diff text payload
scenarios.description: Submit a diff_text exceeding typical size limits to test RAG retrieval and processing stability.

steps.assertion: Server does not crash and processes or rejects based on size limits

scenarios.expected_result: The system should either process the diff or return a clean error if limits are exceeded (e.g., 413 Payload Too Large).

scenarios.title: Pipeline run with empty diff content
scenarios.description: Submit a run where diff_text is empty or contains no valid changes.

steps.assertion: Pipeline stage DIFF_ANALYZED reports zero changes

scenarios.expected_result: The pipeline should initialize but may yield events indicating no files were analyzed.

scenarios.title: Path traversal attempt in report retrieval
scenarios.description: Attempt to access files outside the reports directory using directory traversal in the run_id parameter.
scenarios.expected_result: The system must sanitize the run_id or handle the Path object safely to prevent unauthorized file access.

scenarios.title: XSS Probe in run_label
scenarios.description: Submit a pipeline run with a script tag in the run_label field.

steps.assertion: Label is stored and returned with proper encoding
Label text is escaped in the response

scenarios.expected_result: The script tag is treated as plain text and not executed in any UI context.

scenarios.title: Concurrent pipeline run requests
scenarios.description: Simulate multiple users starting pipeline runs simultaneously to check background task handling.
scenarios.expected_result: The server handles concurrent background tasks without race conditions or shared state corruption.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
API_PIPELINE_RUN = f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run"
API_REPORTS = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports"

# SCENARIO_ID: dc41e14d-46b0-4a67-9152-168af075d058
def test_trigger_successful_pipeline_run_returns_202(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    payload = {
        "run_label": "Happy Path Run",
        "diff_text": "diff --git a/app/main.py b/app/main.py
+@app.get('/')
+def read_root():
+    return {'Hello': 'World'}"
    }
    response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data=payload)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.status == 202
    
    body = response.json()
    assert "run_id" in body
    assert len(body["run_id"]) > 0

# SCENARIO_ID: 57bc8653-4615-4be7-91e4-98bc2905f518
def test_list_completed_pipeline_reports_returns_summaries(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    response = page.request.get(API_REPORTS)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    reports = response.json()
    assert isinstance(reports, list)

# SCENARIO_ID: 3a3e5759-1bf4-4e30-8c86-b9b16c13c8af
def test_retrieve_specific_report_details_returns_200(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    run_id = "test-uuid-123"
    # Note: This test assumes pre-existence of test-uuid-123 or a mock
    response = page.request.get(f"{API_REPORTS}/{run_id}")
    
    if response.status == 404:
        pytest.skip(f"Report {run_id} not found in environment")
        
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    body = response.json()
    assert "diff_result" in body

# SCENARIO_ID: 696d235f-648e-41c3-9718-1a29a5b062bc
def test_submit_pipeline_run_with_empty_payload_returns_422(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    # Empty JSON payload to trigger FastAPI validation error
    response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data={})
    expect(response).not.to_be_ok()
    assert response.status == 422

# SCENARIO_ID: 1bebb2c5-ef7f-4ac9-9631-1c98fb19c45c
def test_request_non_existent_report_id_returns_404(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    response = page.request.get(f"{API_REPORTS}/non-existent-id")
    expect(response).not.to_be_ok()
    assert response.status == 404

# SCENARIO_ID: af6371fc-4ec9-4ce7-a1ec-b20fdda3b02e
def test_handle_extremely_large_diff_payload_stability(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    large_diff = "diff --git a/large.txt b/large.txt
" + ("+content
" * 10000)
    payload = {
        "run_label": "Performance Test",
        "diff_text": large_diff
    }
    response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data=payload)
    # System should either accept (202) or reject with 413, but not 500 crash
    assert response.status in [202, 413]
    expect(response).not.to_have_status(500)

# SCENARIO_ID: 9ade2a74-7ed5-40fd-9b76-6c06a6601686
def test_pipeline_run_with_empty_diff_content(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    payload = {
        "run_label": "Empty Diff",
        "diff_text": ""
    }
    response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data=payload)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.status == 202

# SCENARIO_ID: eaa138a4-9bc3-414b-8f80-f9d461bb7012
def test_path_traversal_attempt_in_report_retrieval_fails(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    # Attempting to access sensitive system files via relative paths
    traversal_id = "../../etc/passwd"
    response = page.request.get(f"{API_REPORTS}/{traversal_id}")
    
    # Security check: Must not return 200
    expect(response).not.to_be_ok()
    assert response.status in [404, 400, 422]

# SCENARIO_ID: f06fa4c0-7533-49a3-b1d4-1d68a024dbb1
def test_xss_probe_in_run_label_is_escaped(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    xss_payload = "<script>alert('xss')</script>"
    payload = {
        "run_label": xss_payload,
        "diff_text": "diff --git a/a b/a
+changes"
    }
    
    # 1. Submit the run
    post_response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data=payload)
    expect(post_response).to_be_ok()
    
    # 2. Check the reports list to ensure it is stored/returned correctly
    get_response = page.request.get(API_REPORTS)
    expect(get_response).to_be_ok()
    
    reports_text = get_response.text()
    # The literal script string should be present (not executed or stripped)
    assert xss_payload in reports_text

# SCENARIO_ID: d22f6a67-10fd-43c7-b5fc-ee6ff81d82b5
def test_concurrent_pipeline_run_requests_receive_unique_ids(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    payload = {
        "run_label": "Concurrency Test",
        "diff_text": "diff --git a/a b/a
+changes"
    }
    
    run_ids = []
    for _ in range(3):
        response = page.request.post(API_PIPELINE_RUN, data=payload)
        expect(response).to_be_ok()
        run_ids.append(response.json()["run_id"])
    
    # Verify all generated IDs are unique
    assert len(set(run_ids)) == len(run_ids)
